# services.gnome

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.gnome`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.gnome.at-spi2-core.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable at-spi2-core, a service for the Assistive Technologies available on the GNOME platform. Enable this if you get the error or warning `The name org.a11y.Bus was not provided by any .service files`. |
| `services.gnome.core-apps.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable GNOME core apps. |
| `services.gnome.core-developer-tools.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable GNOME core developer tools. |
| `services.gnome.core-os-services.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable essential services for GNOME3. |
| `services.gnome.core-shell.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable GNOME Shell services. |
| `services.gnome.evolution-data-server.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Evolution Data Server, a collection of services for storing addressbooks and calendars. |
| `services.gnome.evolution-data-server.plugins` | `list of package` | Plugins for Evolution Data Server. |
| `services.gnome.games.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable GNOME games. |
| `services.gnome.gcr-ssh-agent.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable GCR SSH agent. |
| `services.gnome.gcr-ssh-agent.package` | `package` | The GCR package to use. |
| `services.gnome.glib-networking.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable network extensions for GLib. |
| `services.gnome.gnome-browser-connector.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable native host connector for the GNOME Shell browser extension, a DBus service allowing to install GNOME Shell extensions from a web browser . |
| `services.gnome.gnome-initial-setup.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable GNOME Initial Setup, a Simple, easy, and safe way to prepare a new system. |
| `services.gnome.gnome-keyring.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable GNOME Keyring daemon, a service designed to take care of the user's security credentials, such as user names and passwords . |
| `services.gnome.gnome-online-accounts.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable GNOME Online Accounts daemon, a service that provides a single sign-on framework for the GNOME desktop. |
| `services.gnome.gnome-remote-desktop.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Remote Desktop support using Pipewire. |
| `services.gnome.gnome-settings-daemon.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable GNOME Settings Daemon. |
| `services.gnome.gnome-software.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable GNOME Software, package manager for GNOME. |
| `services.gnome.gnome-user-share.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable GNOME User Share, a user-level file sharing service for GNOME. |
| `services.gnome.localsearch.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable LocalSearch, indexing services for TinySPARQL search engine and metadata storage system. |
| `services.gnome.rygel.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Rygel UPnP Mediaserver. You will need to also allow UPnP connections in firewall, see the following [comment](https://github.com/NixOS/nixpkgs/pull/45045#issuecomment-416030795). |
| `services.gnome.rygel.package` | `package` | The rygel package to use. |
| `services.gnome.sushi.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Sushi, a quick previewer for nautilus. |
| `services.gnome.tinysparql.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable TinySPARQL services, a search engine, search tool and metadata storage system. |
